hero.heading: Mortgages for Truck Drivers
hero.subheading: Specialized mortgage solutions for professional truck drivers with non-traditional income.

intro.heading: Understanding Truck Driver Income
paragraphs: Searching for mortgages for truck drivers near you in New York, New Jersey, Florida, or Pennsylvania? Green Street Capital is a licensed mortgage broker that compares multiple lenders for mortgages for truck drivers and related programs — so you are not limited to one bank’s rules.
Traditional lenders often struggle with truck driver income structures. We understand the trucking industry and work with lenders who appreciate your unique financial situation.
Whether you are an owner-operator or company driver, we review how you are paid and which documentation best supports a strong application.
bullets: Owner-operators with variable income based on miles and rates
Company drivers with per diem and bonus structures
Team drivers with split income arrangements
Drivers with significant business expenses that reduce taxable income

sidebar.heading: Why Traditional Lenders Struggle
sidebar.body: W-2 and tax-return-only underwriting may understate earning power when expenses, per diem, or seasonal miles are involved.

programs.title: Bank Statement Loans

faqs.question: Can truck drivers get a mortgage with variable income?
faqs.answer: Often yes. Lenders may average income over time or use alternative documentation depending on the program.

faqs.question: Do you work with owner-operators?
faqs.answer: Yes. We regularly review owner-operator scenarios and available program options.

faqs.question: What should I prepare?
faqs.answer: Recent bank statements, tax returns if available, CDL/employment details, and a list of debts and assets help us move faster.

faqs.question: Are mortgages for truck drivers available in New York?
faqs.answer: Yes. Green Street Capital helps eligible borrowers explore mortgages for truck drivers in New York (including NYC and surrounding areas) as a licensed mortgage broker. NMLS #2066586.

faqs.question: Can I get mortgages for truck drivers in New Jersey or Florida?
faqs.answer: Often yes where licensed and program guidelines allow. We serve NY, NJ, FL, and PA — ask about mortgages for truck drivers for your state.

faqs.question: How do I apply for mortgages for truck drivers?
faqs.answer: Schedule a free consultation or choose a loan officer on our Team page. We will review income, credit, property, and program fit.

faqs.question: What credit score do I need for mortgages for truck drivers?
faqs.answer: Requirements vary by lender and program. We review your full profile — credit is only one factor alongside income, reserves, and property type.

cta.heading: Ready to explore financing?
